keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Guyana 1, Antigua and Barbuda 0. Kelsey Benjamin (Guyana) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Liam Gordon with a cross.
Aaron Taylor-Sinclair (Antigua and Barbuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Guyana 2, Antigua and Barbuda 0. Omari Glasgow (Guyana) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Kelsey Benjamin.
Jonathan Grant (Guyana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
